prompt:
You are shown one page from a SEC 10-K filing rendered as an image.
This page contains the END of "Item 1A. Risk Factors". The next section is "Item 1C. Cybersecurity".
Transcribe VERBATIM the last 5 lines of "Item 1A" body text before the next item begins:
if the "Item 1C" heading appears on this page, take the 5 lines just before it; otherwise Item 1A continues to the bottom, so take the last 5 lines of the page (ignore running headers, page numbers, footers).
Respond with ONLY a JSON object: {"lines": ["line 1", "line 2", ...]}
